label: Principal Software Engineer at Synergy Information Solutions
headline: Principal Software Engineer — AI Product Architecture, RAG Workflows & Full-Stack Development

ai-research.title: Principal AI Researcher & Engineer
ai-research.summary: Engineering production-ready AI capabilities and platform architectures. Developed structured RAG workflows and agentic frameworks (Cognition/BookForge) with a focus on governance, state integrity, and reliability in multi-agent environments.
description: Architected and implemented the Pillars of the Domain of Domains (DoD), a formal runtime governance architecture for RAG systems addressing context drift and unverifiable memory.
Built BookForge, a Python-based AI workflow engine featuring multi-provider LLM orchestration (OpenAI, Gemini) and a layered prompt governance pipeline for long-horizon content generation.
Developed Cognition, a 19-project C# agent framework designed for deterministic execution, tool dispatching, and durable state management.
Applied RAG architecture principles to production-style workflows, focusing on citation integrity and scope control for AI-enabled features.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer & Systems Architect
iadvantage.summary: Led the technical direction of a GLP-compliant lab platform in a highly regulated environment where reliability and data integrity were critical.
description: Owned the delivery of high-value product features across a complex stack of WebForms, MVC, WebAPI, and mobile surfaces.
Designed and implemented user-defined data models and configurable reporting pipelines that allowed for customer-specific extensibility without code changes.
Guided release engineering and technical standards for the development team, ensuring high-quality deployments in uptime-sensitive environments.
Built responsive front-end interfaces using TypeScript patterns and modern CSS, ensuring performant user experiences across desktop and mobile.
Developed and maintained .NET Core services with Hangfire and Entity Framework over PostgreSQL to drive automated insurance workflows.
Identified and removed delivery bottlenecks by clarifying service boundaries and introducing domain-driven design patterns.
Collaborated closely with product leadership to balance speed and quality while triaging production issues in complex systems.

prestage-farms.title: Principal Developer (Modernization)
description: Led a team of 9 in the end-to-end modernization of critical business systems, delivering the project three months ahead of schedule through pragmatic Agile roadmaps.
Architected a unified desktop platform that consolidated 8+ modules into a single, high-performance C#/.NET application.
Established technical decision records and documentation patterns to ensure long-term platform sustainability and knowledge sharing.
